title: Amazon Support Engineer H-1B LCA 2024 | h1bdata.info
note: 637 records; H-1B wage Level I (entry prevailing wage) median $103,350 on 234 records; sample Level I records: $84.3K–$88.1K–$112.7K; overall range $60.8K–$156.7K. H-1B workers tend to have 1+ years experience, making this an upper anchor for the L1 distribution.
